description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated figure with an elaborate headdress and four arms, each hand positioned in a distinct gesture. The figure sits cross-legged on a round, ornate pedestal with detailed carvings along its edge. The surface of the sculpture has a weathered, greenish patina, suggesting it is made of aged bronze or copper alloy. The facial features and body details are stylized, with pronounced eyes, nose, and lips, and the arms are symmetrically arranged. The back view reveals a draped garment and the continuation of the headdress, while the side views highlight the depth and three-dimensionality of the figure. The overall form is compact and solid, with no visible openings or receptacles.
description: A weathered bronze or copper alloy sculpture of a seated, four-armed figure with an ornate headdress, sitting cross-legged on a round, decorated pedestal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the seated figure, highlighting the headdress and the forward-facing arm gestures.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the headdress, draped garment, and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, emphasizing the figure's facial features and the detailed base.
description_view_3: Frontal view of the figure, clearly showing the face, four arms with distinct hand gestures, and the ornate pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: seated four-armed human figure with headdress
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
